name: 綠茶前任×正宮妻子（明爭暗鬥）
name_en: Green Tea Ex × Legitimate Wife (Open and Covert Battle)
description: 童黛vs紀南喬的對決是觀眾最愛的正宮手撕小三模式，但本劇的特殊之處在於女主用讀心術提前看穿對方每一步，讓觀眾享受'降維打擊'的爽感。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Namja, here it comes. She's about to say I didn't mean to come between you two... Mom. Mom. Mom, don't tell me she's right again... Her inner thoughts are real. Oh no. Mom, you can't get a divorce. This isn't a jinx. This is clearly the Rome family's living ancestor.
examples.context: 童黛vs紀南喬的對決是觀眾最愛的正宮手撕小三模式，但本劇的特殊之處在於女主用讀心術提前看穿對方每一步，讓觀眾享受'降維打擊'的爽感。
